chosen_action.title: Allow the execution-board runner to execute repo conversion proof assets instead of collapsing them into a board-refresh no-op

why_this_action.summary: At 2026-05-26 07:24 Europe/Berlin the live selector was correctly holding on distribution_architecture_guard_pause because the short review-window congestion does not clear until 2026-05-26T08:57:00 and the execution board still has no truthful do-now packet. While checking the next truthful post-hold lanes, I found a structural runner bug: the selector already knows how to choose repo_conversion_proof_asset after exhausted demand-capture windows, and the executor already knows how to build that asset, but outcome_execution_board_runner did not treat that lane as executable. In that state, the runner would log a fake-success board refresh instead of advancing the proof asset.
shared_findings_used: agents/marketing/logs/distribution_lane_latest.json: current lane remains under the active distribution-architecture guard pause until 2026-05-26T08:57:00
drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md: execution board still says no truthful do-now handoff packet is currently available
agents/marketing/outcome_execution_board_runner.py: BOARD_LANES omitted repo_conversion_proof_asset even though the executor supports it
agents/marketing/distribution_lane_executor.py: repo_conversion_proof_asset already has a concrete execution path
agents/marketing/tests/test_distribution_lane_selector_repair_pause.py: selector regression already proves repo_conversion_proof_asset is the truthful lane after the StackOverflow slot is exhausted

result.summary: Patched outcome_execution_board_runner so repo_conversion_proof_asset is treated as an executable lane with its own measurement window, then added regression coverage proving the runner now executes that lane instead of downgrading it into distribution_architecture_repair.

verification.live_execution_board_runner_0724: board refreshed / no truthful do-now lane available
verification.repaired_failure_mode: future repo_conversion_proof_asset selections now execute instead of being collapsed into a board-refresh no-op

replacement_condition: If a future post-hold run still lands on an empty board after repo_conversion_proof_asset becomes available, escalate into selector/board surfacing truth rather than accepting another passive board refresh.
